stemHtml: While flying en route, the crew observes white smoke coming out from the radar panel, situated in the middle console, with the smell of burning insulation. The recommended actions for the crew to take are:

options.a: Use the hand fire extinguisher to suppress the smoke and follow the checklist.
options.b: Switch off all electrical equipment, transmit a MAYDAY call, and land immediately.
options.c: Switch off the radar, ensure safe flight conditions, and follow the checklist.
options.d: Use the hand fire extinguisher to suppress the smoke and land immediately.
